headline: Ladenburg Thalmann Maintains Buy on Host Hotels & Resorts, Raises Price Target to $28
summary: Ladenburg Thalmann  analyst Floris Van Dijkum   maintains Host Hotels & Resorts (NASDAQ:HST) with a Buy and raises the price target from $25 to $28.
